sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Red bar is now vertical at rows 24-29, cols 18-21
# Blue block is at rows 20-23, cols 18-21
# Green center at rows 38-39, cols 10-11 (safe from blue block)
# Let me try clicking blue container to swap blue block and checkerboard back

action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 35, 'col': 48}])
print("After clicking blue container:")
print("  Board changed:", last_action_result.get('board_changed'))
print("  Game over:", last_action_result.get('game_over'))
print("  Level completed:", last_action_result.get('level_completed'))

# Check blue block and checkerboard positions
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("\nCurrent objects on left side:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ['N', 'R', 'r', 'b', 'g', 'Y'] and n['pixels'] > 2:
        boundary = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in boundary]
        cols = [p[1] for p in boundary]
        center_col = sum(cols) // len(cols)
        if center_col < 32:
            print(f"  {n['color']}: pixels={n['pixels']}, rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
